subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Ancient Beauty! Thou art mentioned and renowned in this heavenly gathering, and manifest in the spiritual assembly [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال قدم در این انجمن رحمانی مذکور و مشهوری و در محفل روحانی مظهر
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
